## Summary

- what changed
- why it changed

## Area

- [ ] storyboard extraction
- [ ] OCR quality / semantic lines
- [ ] transition inference
- [ ] summary / understanding
- [ ] artifact contracts
- [ ] benchmark harness
- [ ] skill-pack ergonomics
- [ ] docs / repo surface

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] artifact contracts / skill docs updated if behavior changed
- [ ] package or installed-pack surface checked if shipped files changed

If relevant, also note:

- benchmark cases rerun
- artifact paths inspected
- known limitations or abstentions introduced on purpose

## Notes

Keep this repo honest. If the change improves operational execution but
does not improve semantic understanding, say that explicitly.
